editor_note: The clever part is not calling itself an open-source Firebase alternative. The clever part is turning Postgres into the center of an entire developer stack: auth, storage, realtime, and edge functions. Where most backend platforms hide the database behind abstractions, Supabase leans into it. That makes the product more opinionated and easier to reason about than a generic backend cloud.
investors: Felicis Ventures, Coatue Management, Y Combinator

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Supabase: The open source Firebase alternative.
Where most backend platforms hide the database behind abstractions, Supabase leans into it.

market_context.primary_user: Developers and engineering teams evaluating build, deployment, or infrastructure workflows.
market_context.why_now: Recent source-backed funding and public product evidence make database, open source, backend worth tracking.

risks.claim: Continued tracking should verify whether the public product evidence turns into durable customer adoption beyond the currently visible surface.
risks.basis: VentureDex editorial assessment based on official product evidence and funding-source review.
